title: DiggingRings
description: Add Ring of Haste I and II working when held in off-hand.
body:
# Digging Rings

## Description:

Tired of breaking and placing multiple beacons just to mine wide areas in the game ?\
Well this mod aims to fix this!

###  
## Features:

Adds two vanilla-like items:
- **Haste Ring I    (Provides Haste I when held in off-hand)**
- **Haste Ring II   (Provides Haste II when held in off-hand)**

See in game Recipes Book or [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/mod/cdxx-diggingrings/gallery) for crafting recipes.
In survival the recipe will unlock upon obtaining Netherite Upgrade Template.

###  
## Compatibility:

Should work with any mods. Message me for further requests.

###  
## About:

No port demands at the moment (versions or loader).\
Please feel free to report bugs/issues and suggestions on [Fabric-Github](https://github.com/CDXX710/diggingring-1.21_fabric).
